author: y4rr
content:
Landed standalone types; op-level integration split out to #615.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-core\`

### \`int_tensor.rs\` — \`IntTensor<I>\`
\`I: IntElement\` trait abstracts over \`i32\` and \`i64\`:
- \`BITS\` constant
- \`dtype_name()\` → \`"i32"\` / \`"i64"\`
- \`try_from_i64(v)\` → \`Option<Self>\` (range-checked)
- \`to_i64(self)\` → widening cast

\`IntTensor\` API:
- \`from_vec(data, shape)\` / \`from_slice(data, shape)\` — with shape-numel validation
- \`zeros(shape)\` / \`scalar(v)\` — uniform / 0-d constructors
- \`arange(n)\` — 1-D \`[0, 1, ..., n-1]\` with range check on \`I\`
- \`cast::<J>()\` — convert to \`IntTensor<J>\` with element-wise range check
- \`reshape(shape)\` — Arc-shared, no data copy
- \`shape()\` / \`numel()\` / \`ndim()\` / \`data()\` / \`dtype_name()\`

### \`bool_tensor.rs\` — \`BoolTensor\`
- \`from_vec\` / \`from_slice\` / \`zeros\` / \`ones\`
- \`from_predicate(&Tensor<T>, |x| ...)\` — lift a closure over a float tensor into a mask
- Pointwise: \`not\`, \`and\`, \`or\`, \`xor\` (shape-checked)
- Reductions: \`count_true\`, \`any\`, \`all\`
- \`reshape\` — same Arc-shared semantics
- \`to_float::<T>()\` — true → 1.0, false → 0.0

## Why standalone (not unified under \`Tensor\`)
The existing \`Tensor<T: Float>\` is built around float-specific abstractions (autograd, GPU kernels keyed on f32/f64, GradFn traits). Generalizing to a universal-dtype \`Tensor\` would touch hundreds of files. \`IntTensor\` / \`BoolTensor\` as separate first-class types give callers the storage they need (token ids, masks, count buffers) without breaking anything.

## Tests (22 new)
- \`int_tensor::tests\` (12): construction, shape mismatch, zeros / arange / scalar, cast in/out of range, reshape, dtype_name, Arc identity on clone
- \`bool_tensor::tests\` (10): zeros/ones, from_predicate, not/and/or/xor, count_true/any/all, reshape, to_float, Arc identity, shape-mismatch error path

\`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions.

## Out of scope → #615
Op-level integration: rewire \`index_select\`, \`gather\`, \`scatter\`, \`embedding\`, \`masked_fill\`, \`where\`, \`masked_select\`, comparison ops (\`gt\`/\`lt\`/etc.) to take \`&IntTensor\` / \`&BoolTensor\` directly. Each op gets a new variant alongside the existing one; once callers migrate, the legacy variants can be deprecated.
